name: Azora Engine
description: Native game engine & app framework written in the Azora language. Compiles to machine code via LLVM; renders with Metal on macOS (Vulkan backend planned).

templates.label: App
templates.description: A native desktop app rendered by the Azora Engine — starts with a title and two buttons.

templates.label: Game
templates.description: A 3D scene with a cube, a fly camera and WASD movement — playable out of the box.
